title: Information by Product A-Z - Canada.ca
content:
## Information by Product A-Z
Get the facts on food safety! This page brings together much of Health Canada's consumer-oriented food safety information, listed by food in an A to Z format.

- Bottled Water Questions and Answers on Bottled Water

- Caffeine and intake levels Caffeine and Your Health

- Candy (sour spray candy)
